title: TAGH Instance Overlay (compose.override.yml shape)
description: Shape of the platform-generated docker-compose.override.yml written under <per-instance-root>/_platform/. This schema is for static contract testing — it describes what the overlay generator MUST emit and what the layered-merge fitness check verifies. It is not a docker-compose schema replacement; only the platform-owned portions are constrained.

name.description: Compose project name. Must equal the per-instance compose_project (tagh-inst-<slug>).

ServiceOverride.description: Override declaration for a service that exists in the substrate compose. Empty `ports` is the substrate-port-strip mechanism (Principle V).

ports.description: MUST be empty for every non-cloudflared service so the merged compose has no host-port bindings outside the tunnel sidecar.

networks.description: MUST include `instance` so the service joins the per-instance network the cloudflared sidecar uses for ingress.

environment.description: MUST be list-form `- NAME` references only (inherits from compose-up parent env). Mapping form `NAME: value` is forbidden because the value would land on disk (Principle IV).

command.description: MUST run `tunnel … run` against the bind-mounted config.

volumes.description: MUST bind-mount the platform-generated cloudflared.yml read-only into /etc/cloudflared/config.yml.

environment.description: Carries TUNNEL_TOKEN as a list-form reference.

ports.description: Cloudflared MAY expose nothing to the host. (No platform service publishes host ports either; ingress is via the named tunnel.)

environment.description: Carries HEARTBEAT_SECRET, HEARTBEAT_URL, and any manifest.spec.env.inherit names as list-form references.

depends_on.description: MUST declare a depends_on for the manifest's primary_service with condition service_healthy or service_started.
